subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou shalt drink from the Kawthar of patience and partake of the Salsabil of steadfastness in thy grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله باسم الهی از کوثر صبر بیاشامی و از سلسبیل اصطبار بنوشی حزنت در
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
